forecast.name: This Afternoon
forecast.detailedForecast: Sunny, with a high near 83. East wind around 8 mph.

forecast.name: Tonight
forecast.detailedForecast: Mostly clear, with a low around 64. Southeast wind 3 to 7 mph.

weather_report:
In Boston this afternoon, sunshine blankets the city, contributing to an air of warmth that beckons citizens to embrace the outdoors. With temperatures hovering comfortably in the low 80s and a gentle easterly breeze weaving through the streets, it presents an ideal opportunity to indulge in leisurely strolls along the waterfront or revel in the vibrant atmosphere of a local café. Tonight, as daylight gracefully recedes, the sky will remain mostly clear, offering a serene backdrop under which the temperature will settle into the mild mid-60s. This inviting warmth invites relaxed gatherings, perhaps a low-key dinner with friends or a calm evening spent drifting through pages of a good book on a cozy patio.

Given this delightful blend of sunshine and softness in the air, dressing in light layers remains wise; a breezy shirt or blouse, paired with comfortable trousers or shorts, would suit the day perfectly. As evening unfolds, a light cardigan may offer just the right touch against the gentle night air, ensuring one remains comfortably at ease. With such inviting conditions, one might find joy in meandering through the city's parks, seeking out a tucked-away spot to relish the twilight, all while savoring the simple pleasures of a quintessential summer day in Boston.
